title: Truth and love; deceivers; abide
summary_text: Elder to elect lady and children—truth in us forever—grace mercy peace—walk in commandment love one another—many deceivers confess not Jesus flesh—watch lose reward—abide doctrine have Father and Son.
key_points: The elder, to the chosen lady and her children, whom I love in truth.
Now I beg you, dear lady, not as though I wrote to you a new commandment, but that which we have had from the beginning, that we love one another.
For many deceivers have gone out into the world, those who don’t confess that Jesus Christ came in the flesh.
Watch yourselves, that we don’t lose the things we have accomplished.
Whoever transgresses and doesn’t remain in the teaching of Christ, doesn’t have God.
evidence_phrases: Jesus Christ came in the flesh
doesn’t remain in the teaching of Christ
